title: Prioritize by impact and risk
body: Not all debt is equal. Security vulnerabilities and bugs in payment code are urgent. Messy CSS in an internal admin page can wait. Rank each item by: severity (critical, high, medium, low) and effort (hours, days, weeks).
code:
# Example prioritization matrix
| Item                          | Severity | Effort | Priority |
|-------------------------------|----------|--------|----------|
| SQL injection in search       | Critical | 2 hrs  | P0       |
| No tests on payment flow      | High     | 2 days | P1       |
| Outdated React version        | Medium   | 1 week | P2       |
| Inconsistent naming in utils  | Low      | 3 hrs  | P3       |
